splash.errorBody: Open the app from the Telegram bot.
splash.initDataExpiredHint: This Telegram session expired. Fully close the mini app, then open ShiftOps again from the bot.
splash.signInAgainHint: No active session. Tap to sign in with Telegram again without reloading the mini app.

dashboard.noShiftBody: If you came in to work, ask the admin to assign a shift to you.
dashboard.criticalLeft: {count, plural, one {# critical task} other {# critical tasks}}

tasks.waiverReason: Describe why the task cannot be done right now
tasks.suspiciousFlagged: Photo looks like a previous one — the admin will be notified

close.warningBody: {count, plural, one {# required task} other {# required tasks}} not completed. Confirm?

summary.title: Shift report
summary.breakdownHelp: Each row shows points contributed out of {max}.

components.completionHelp: Tasks you finished or had waived.
components.criticalComplianceHelp: All-or-nothing: a single missed critical task drops this to zero.
components.timelinessHelp: Closed on time = full points. Linear penalty over a 2-hour overrun.
components.photoQualityHelp: Photos that didn't look like a copy of a previous one.

errors.network: Offline. We'll send it when you're back online.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Invite staff with a Telegram link
team.hint: Send the link in a private chat. One use, when they press Start in the bot.
team.emptyTitle: You are the only one here
team.emptyBody: Invite your first teammate — a Telegram link, no manual IDs.
team.membersLoadFailed: Could not load the member list. Try again later.

changeRole.title: Change role
changeRole.description: Pick a new role. Owner can only be assigned via the bot.

remove.title: Remove this member?
remove.description: {name} won't be able to open ShiftOps anymore. You can re-invite them later.

manageErrors.cannot_manage_self: You cannot perform this action on yourself.
manageErrors.cannot_manage_super_admin: This user is protected at the platform level.
manageErrors.insufficient_role: Not allowed. Only owner or super-admin can do this.
manageErrors.cannot_change_owner_role: Owner role is managed via /org_set_owner in the bot.

onboarding.title: Welcome to ShiftOps
onboarding.subtitle: Real-time HoReCa shift control — straight inside Telegram.

slide1.title: Open and close-of-shift checklists
slide1.body: Operators get tasks with photo proof and comments. No paper checklists, no skipped steps.

slide2.title: Anti-fake protection and quality score
slide2.body: Photo similarity checks and an automatic shift score show exactly where discipline slipped.

slide3.title: You're ready
slide3.body: Without an invite yet? Ask the owner or admin to send you a link. As soon as you accept it, you'll land on your shift.

history.title: Shift history
history.subtitle: Your last {count, plural, one {# shift} other {# shifts}}
history.emptyHint: Once you close your first shift it'll appear here.

templates.emptyHint: Create one to start scheduling shifts from it.
templates.reorderHint: Drag the handle, or use the arrows for keyboard reordering.
templates.deleteErrorInUse: This template is in use and cannot be deleted. Close existing shifts first.
templates.confirmDelete: Delete this template? This cannot be undone.

validation.taskTitle: Each task title must be 3–255 characters.

analytics.title: Owner analytics

heatmap.title: Performance heatmap
heatmap.help: Each cell is the average score in that day-of-week × hour slot.

violators.title: Top violators
violators.help: Operators ranked by shifts closed with violations.
violators.empty: Nobody has violations in this range. Nice.

analytics.empty: No closed shifts in this range.
analytics.emptyHint: Once shifts close, the dashboard fills with insight.

csvImport.title: Import schedule
csvImport.subtitle: Upload a CSV with date, time, location, template, operator.
csvImport.format: Required columns: date, time_start, time_end, location, template, operator. Operator is @username, numeric Telegram id, or full name.

errorCodes.unknown_location: Location not found in your organisation.
errorCodes.unknown_operator: Operator not found. Add them in Telegram first.
errorCodes.empty_window: End time must be after start time.
errorCodes.past_window: Start time is in the past.
errorCodes.duplicate_shift: This operator already has a shift at that time.
errorCodes.too_many_rows: Too many rows in one upload.

live.title: Live monitor
live.subtitle: Active shifts across the organisation.
live.emptyHint: When operators start shifts, they appear here in real time.
live.criticalLeft: {count, plural, one {# critical pending} other {# critical pending}}
